title: A Tesla solar owner went looking for their lease, and got an ancient text about fallen angels instead.
summary: “When I logged into my Tesla account and view my lease/contract with it, it loads a PDF which just shows the Book of Enoch?” the anonymous owner said in a Reddit post (first spotted by Electrek ). “What do I even do…
